inline_comments.message:
thanks for the update

in official doc, we encourage projects to limit the reference to the wiki (useful working place but hard to version and to know if the current page is the good one + anybody can amend the page/move it/... ) Would it be possible to put the doc in the rst, it would avoid the inconvenients linked to the wiki.
Thanks very much for your time reviewing this and thanks for your good feedback. I addressed your comment and submitted a new patchset 2 with the fix. Please kindly review.

you have issue with bullets

1) and 2) and later a), b) are not displayed as you expected

in rst for ordered bullet you shall follow the syntax https://docutils.sourceforge.io/docs/user/rst/quickref.html#enumerated-lists
